- Hi Shubham,
- I need to take today off to get myself together. Rather than continuing to simply say that I am sick, I wanted to give you a bit more context about what has been going on.
- I have been struggling quite a bit with my neck and back lately. When I sit down at my desk in the mornings, my neck often becomes very tense almost immediately. When it gets that tight, it can make it difficult to think clearly, which then leads to stress and sometimes confusion about what I should be focusing on.
- I also get the sense that you may be trying to give me space so I have time to complete my work, but Iâ€™m not entirely sure. At the moment I feel a little unclear about my role on the team, and I sometimes feel out of step with my work, the team, and the company goals. I think a conversation might help bring some clarity.
- On my side, I am taking steps to address this. Iâ€™ve started seeing a counsellor again, exercising more, and making sure Iâ€™m maintaining a good diet. As we discussed previously, I have also booked an appointment with my doctor to talk about whatâ€™s going on and possibly get some additional tests done. Unfortunately, the earliest appointment available is April 6.
- Thank you for your understanding, and Iâ€™m happy to talk whenever it makes sense.
- Kind regards,
  Jeff
- ![](data:image/png;base64,)
